name: Oatmeal "Rocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, soda, cinnamon, and salt).
4. Stir in the raisins and chopped nuts evenly throughout the mixture.
5. Slowly add milk to achieve a stiff dough consistency.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet, spacing them about 1 inch apart.
7. Bake at a moderate temperature (350°F) for 10-12 minutes, or until set.
